intentSynonyms: look up field choices in airtable
fetch a single field choices in airtable
view one specific field choices in airtable
get select/multi-select field choices in airtable
description: Get the available choices for a single-select or multi-select field. Returns choice IDs, names, and colors. Use the choice ID (sel prefix) when setting cell values for select fields.

field_id.description: Field/column ID (fld prefix) — must be a select or multiSelect type
